title: Nvidia in the News: US Official Claims Moonshot Accessed Banned Chips
description: Recent reports highlight claims regarding Moonshot AI's access to restricted technology and allegations of intellectual property theft involving Nvidia chips.

sources.title: China's Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic, Trump tech adviser says
Startup founders urge Trump not to shut off Chinese open weight AI
US Official Says Moonshot Accessed Banned Nvidia Chips

sections.heading: US Official Claims on Chip Access
paragraphs: According to Bloomberg.com, a US official stated that Moonshot AI accessed banned Nvidia chips.

sections.heading: Accusations of Intellectual Property Theft
paragraphs: The BBC reports that a tech adviser to Trump claimed China's Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic.

sections.heading: Startup Founders' Appeal to Trump
paragraphs: According to Politico, startup founders have urged Trump not to shut off Chinese open weight AI.

faq.q: What did the US official say about Moonshot AI and Nvidia?
faq.a: According to Bloomberg.com, a US official said that Moonshot AI accessed banned Nvidia chips.

faq.q: What are the allegations regarding Anthropic?
faq.a: The BBC reports that a Trump tech adviser claimed China's Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic.

faq.q: What is the stance of startup founders regarding Chinese AI?
faq.a: According to Politico, startup founders urged Trump not to shut off Chinese open weight AI.
